name: zhi-hu
title: ZhiHu
description: Browse and search your Zhihu answers.
author: CaffeineCat

commands.name: search-my-answer
commands.title: Search My Answers
commands.subtitle: ZhiHu
commands.description: Browse and search your answers on Zhihu.

preferences.name: urlToken
preferences.title: URL Token
preferences.description: Your Zhihu URL token (the part after zhihu.com/people/ in your profile URL)

preferences.name: cookie
preferences.title: Cookie
preferences.description: Your Zhihu cookie. Required fields: _xsrf, z_c0, SESSIONID

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
